# soulMates

> Discover your music DNA and find people who share your taste.

soulMates is a mobile app (iOS & Android) that analyzes your music preferences to build a unique music personality profile. By swiping through curated tracks, the app maps your taste across 12 musical axes and derives personality traits including Big Five and MBTI dimensions.

## How It Works

- Users swipe through curated music tracks (like/dislike)
- Each track has a 12-dimensional feature vector (energy, valence, danceability, acousticness, instrumentalness, speechiness, liveness, tempo, loudness, complexity, mood stability, rhythmic regularity)
- Swipe history builds a personalized "music genome" — a weighted average across all axes
- Personality traits (Big Five facets, MBTI dimensions) are derived from the music genome using research-backed mappings between audio features and psychological traits

## Matching

Users are matched with others whose musical aura (12-axis profile) is most similar. Compatibility is computed as cosine similarity between music genomes. Matched users can exchange emoji reactions and listen to music together in real-time.

## Key Features

- Music personality profiling (12 musical axes)
- Big Five personality trait inference from music taste
- MBTI prediction from music preferences
- Compatibility matching based on musical aura similarity
- Emoji-based reactions with matches
- Collaborative music listening sessions
- Micro-genre discovery and exploration
- QR code invite system for connecting with friends

## Company
